caption: A close-up shot of a human eye transitions into a surreal visual effect where the pupil becomes a portal. The scene zooms through this opening, revealing a bright, swirling blue water surface. As the camera continues to move forward and rotate, a white curved banner unfurls and expands to fill the screen. This banner displays a portrait of a man with glasses and short brown hair wearing a dark suit and white shirt. Accompanying text on the banner reads, "Tiger Technicians Hour with host: Basil Chapman Author of: CD book 'The Chapman Wave' and the Opening Call newsletter". Below this, a larger logo appears featuring the website "TFNN.COM" and the tagline "EDUCATING INVESTORS". The background transitions from the initial blue water to a blurred, light-blue aquatic environment as the informational text and logo come into full view.
